messageSubstring: Nested git repo detected in projects/openclaw-fabric/.git
diagnosis: The validation script rejected the repository root .git directory instead of only descendant nested project repos.
fix: Ignore ./.git while scanning and reject only child .git directories below the project root.

messageSubstring: Provider boundary fixture failed to reject worker lifecycle semantics.
diagnosis: The provider boundary grep was case-sensitive, so camel-cased lifecycle identifiers such as leakedTaskId were not detected.
fix: Use case-insensitive grep for direct Sable import and provider lifecycle scans.
